title: cordula stonei
intro: Cordyline stonei, also known as the cabbage tree or ti plant, is a plant species native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Cordyline stonei include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Cordyline stonei may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional before consumption.
